input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule D.8.1.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: d.8.1.1
            TITLE: doo - cone is down or out when one or both:

            CONTENT:
            rule D.8.1.1: DOO - Cone is Down or Out when one or both:
D.8.1.1 DOO - Cone is Down or Out when one or both:  
a. Cone has been knocked over (Down) 
b. The entire base of the cone lies outside the box marked around the cone in its 
undisturbed position (Out)

final_answer: D.8.1.1 DOO - Cone is Down or Out when one or both: a. Cone has been knocked over (Down) b. The entire base of the cone lies outside the box marked around the cone in its undisturbed position (Out)
